{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Seishen King Dakata
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seishen King Dakata]] is a broad-shouldered man who wears bulky gray armor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Seishen King Dakata]] fought a dreadbeast with the power of an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
